headline: Zoetis (ZTS) Stock Draws Fresh Price Target Split After Difficult Q1 Update
summary: Zoetis is back in focus as analysts recalibrate their price targets, with Citi cutting its view to US$112 from US$145 while other firms move to US$95 and US$115 after a sharp reset in sentiment. These changes track closely with a Q1 update that some call "difficult" and "worse than it seems," even as bullish voices highlight the company’s premium portfolio and revised 2026 guidance. The following sections explain how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving analyst...

headline: PAHC Stock: What's Driving Phibro's Animal Health Growth
summary: Phibro Animal Health unit drove 74% of fiscal 2025 revenue, fueled by MFA, vaccines and global expansion, helping offset pressure in other businesses.
